evals.prompt: Create a LYCC SRE ticket: summary 'SRE | Test runbook for Redis failover', description with steps and owner, assign to my lead's email (use placeholder assignee@example.com if unknown), link to epic 'SRE | Temporary Epic', priority Medium, component SRE.
evals.expected_output: Uses Jira MCP to create LYCC issue with SRE component, epic link, assignee, priority; returns browse URL and confirms fields.

evals.prompt: I want a new ticket like https://jira.workers-hub.com/browse/LYCC-9796 but for 'rotate TLS certs on staging ALB' — same epic and component pattern, Task type.
evals.expected_output: Fetches LYCC-9796 (or asks for missing bits), creates new Task with SRE component and same epic as reference unless user overrides, returns new key and URL.

evals.prompt: Search LYCC for open Epics with SRE in the name and list keys; do not create a ticket yet.
evals.expected_output: Uses jira_search with JQL, returns epic keys/summaries; does not call create unless user asked to.
